     The Numbers Business Report

Aloha (2015)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $21,052,030Details
International Box Office $4,335,061
Worldwide Box Office $25,387,091
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $4,258,418
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,779,220
Total $6,037,638
Further financial details...

Synopsis

In Aloha, a celebrated military contractor returns to the site of his greatest career triumphs – the US Space program in Honolulu, Hawaii – and reconnects with a long-ago love while unexpectedly falling for the hard-charging Air Force watchdog assigned to him.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$9,670,235 (45.9% of total gross)
Legs:2.18 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:82.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$37,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,815 opening theaters/2,815 max. theaters, 2.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $29,867,409

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 29th, 2015 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: May 27th, 2015 (Wide) (Trinidad)
June 4th, 2015 (Wide) (New Zealand)
June 4th, 2015 (Wide) (Australia)
June 4th, 2015 (Wide) (Singapore)
June 11th, 2015 (Wide) (Brazil)
Video Release: August 15th, 2015 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for some language including suggestive comments.
(Rating bulletin 2368, 4/8/2015)
Running Time: 105 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Voiceover/Narration, Whitewashed Casting
Geographical setting: Hawaii
Plot point: Romance
Social setting: Military Life
Subgenre: Comedy Drama
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Scott Rudin Productions, Vinyl Films, LStar Capital, RatPac Entertainment, Columbia Pictures, Regency Enterprises
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
